title: Confetti Lib
description: Adds confetti particles to the game, which can be used by other mods
body: # Confetti Lib ## Features - The `/extended_particle` Command: This command offers advanced options for generating minecraft particles, allowing for more detailed control. - Confetti Particles: These festive particles can be created using either the `/particle` or `/extended_particle` command. ![Confetti flying through the air](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5s9W6kVl/images/067d7bb16af4ba00bbab747a9cb4dd71326c9388.png) ## Depending on Confetti Lib You can use this mod as a dependency in your own mod. Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/Tomate0613/confetti/wiki) to get started Created for ModFest: Carnival!
